mapper.sql: abld.be_late_date, abld.be_late_time, abld.be_late_year, abld.be_late_month, abld.attribute1, abld.attribute2, abld.attribute3, abld.id, abld.create_time, abld.update_by, abld.update_time, abld.create_by,abld.enabled_flag, abld.late_flag

${tAlias}.be_late_date as ${tAlias}_be_late_date, ${tAlias}.be_late_time as ${tAlias}_be_late_time, ${tAlias}.be_late_year as ${tAlias}_be_late_year, ${tAlias}.be_late_month as ${tAlias}_be_late_month, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.late_flag as ${tAlias}_late_flag
mapper.insert: insert into ac_be_late_date (be_late_date, be_late_time, be_late_year, be_late_month, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3,enabled_flag, create_time, update_by, update_time, create_by) values (#{beLateDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{beLateTime,jdbcType=TIME}, #{beLateYear,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{beLateMonth,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update ac_be_late_date set be_late_date = #{beLateDate,jdbcType=DATE}, be_late_time = #{beLateTime,jdbcType=TIME}, be_late_year = #{beLateYear,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, be_late_month = #{beLateMonth,jdbcType=INTEGER}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
